name: Dole Lemon Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve 1/4 cup juice or syrup.
2. Combine the reserved liquid with garlic, ketchup, honey, Worcestershire sauce, rosemary, and salt. Stir in lemon slices and pineapple.
3. Arrange chicken in a 3-quart shallow casserole dish. Pour the pineapple mixture over the chicken. Cover and refrigerate overnight or for at least 3 hours.
4. Remove chicken from the dish. Pour sauce into a saucepan. Stir in cornstarch. Cook, stirring, over medium heat until clear and thickened and just coming to a boil.
5. Brush chicken generously with sauce and bake at 450 degrees for 30 minutes.
